context_text: <B> but you i mean you being in manhattan like probably spend quite a bit of time underground in subways right / <A> yes / <B> and you know it is a closed environment and yet i mean i know that when i'm in subways that are i still for the most part feel pretty safe / <A> yeah / <B> um and you know when i look around i think most people feel pretty safe and i don't think i think that that the worst thing to do is to really preoccupy yourself with that it it is a valid concern but i think in some ways you know uh it feels weird saying this but i think by by keeping it so much in people's consciousness / <A> yeah / <B> uh is probably more of a disservice than again you know like um keeping people in a state of panic { you } / <A> [ yeah ]
